title: Pancreator workflow index
description: The top-level file at library/workflows/<slug>/workflow.json. It declares run-wide settings and the ordered list of stage slugs. Each slug resolves to library/workflows/<slug>/stages/<stage-slug>.json, validated by stage.schema.json. The harness assembles these into one self-contained workflow.snapshot.json per run.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this workflow definition. Always 1 for the prototype.

slug.description: Unique workflow identifier and directory name, e.g. 'dev'.

description.description: One- or two-sentence summary of what the workflow delivers.

start_stage.description: Slug of the entry stage. Must appear in stages[].

limits.description: Circuit breakers enforced by the harness. Exceeding any limit pauses the run and writes a decision record.

max_total_transitions.description: Hard cap on total stage transitions in one run.

max_stage_attempts.description: Maximum invocation attempts for any single stage.

max_consecutive_failures.description: Maximum consecutive failure transitions before pausing.

stages.description: Ordered stage slugs. Each resolves to stages/<slug>.json. The graph formed by every stage's transitions must reach all stages from start_stage.
